text: 3 dead, 14 hospitalized in shooting on Sixth Street; suspect killed by Austin police - KUT

text: Live updates: U.S. military confirms 3 troops killed as Iran lashes out with missiles on Day 2 of Mideast war - CBS News

text: Flights cancelled and new travel warnings issued after Iran strikes - BBC

text: Polymarket Iran Bets Hit $529 Million as New Wallets Draw Notice - Bloomberg.com
fullText: As US and Israeli bombs fell on Iran this weekend, bettors on Polymarket — where $529 million was traded on contracts tied to the timing of the strikes — were cashing in. Almost immediately, blockchain sleuths began hunting for unusual patterns in recent bets.

text: Measles outbreaks are costing the U.S. millions of dollars. The true losses can't be counted. - NBC News
fullText: In 2026, there have been over 1,000 cases of measles. If vaccination rates keep dropping, the costs of medical care, public health efforts and lost work productivity could skyrocket.

text: The US burned through more of its limited Tomahawk stockpile in strikes on Iran. It might need them in a war with China. - Business Insider
